description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu, build-osx, and build-windows. Each job should check out the repository, install dependencies, generate a project with CMake, build the project, and run tests. The build-ubuntu job should run on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04, the build-osx job on macos-latest, and the build-windows job on windows-latest.
